title: Syntax error in code node due to misplaced return
symptom: The code node throws an 'Unexpected token' error when executing the workflow, indicating a syntax issue in the provided code.
not_this_if: Error occurs in a different node type
root_cause: The error occurs because the 'return' statement is incorrectly placed outside of a function context, and there are additional syntax issues such as incorrect parentheses and extra commas.
fix_steps: Remove the misplaced parentheses around the return statement.
Ensure the return statement is inside a function.
Fix any additional syntax errors, such as removing extra commas.
agent_instruction: Correct the syntax in the code node as per the identified issues.
